creator: pst@Shockwave.COM
text:
The following manual pages should be part of FreeBSD 2.0 but aren't.
I've already culled the list of stuff that shouldn't be part of 2.0,
or has moved, so these are ones that really do matter:

This is missing and if existed, would conflict in name with man4/fd.4.gz
which is on file descriptors:
-rwxrwxrwx    1 bin      bin          1417 Oct 26 09:57 ./man4/i386/fd.4.gz

There is a mising mlink from man4/[i386/]mem to man4/[i386/]kmem:
-r--r--r--    1 bin      bin          1418 Jun 29 17:40 ./man4/kmem.4.gz

These should exist in the man4/i386 subdirectory and are missing from
both man4 and man4/i386:
-r--r--r--    1 bin      bin          2234 Jun 29 17:40 ./man4/cd.4.gz
-r--r--r--    1 bin      bin          1018 Jun 29 17:40 ./man4/ch.4.gz
-r--r--r--    1 bin      bin          5062 Jun 29 17:40 ./man4/ddb.4.gz
-r--r--r--    1 bin      bin          2004 Jun 29 17:40 ./man4/scsi.4.gz
-r--r--r--    1 bin      bin          2965 Jun 29 17:40 ./man4/sd.4.gz
-r--r--r--    1 bin      bin          4552 Jun 29 17:40 ./man4/st.4.gz
-r--r--r--    1 bin      bin           702 Jun 29 17:40 ./man4/su.4.gz
-r--r--r--    1 bin      bin           606 Jun 29 17:40 ./man4/uk.4.gz

These should exist and are missing:
-r--r--r--    1 bin      bin          7299 Jun 29 17:40 ./man4/bpf.4.gz
-r--r--r--    1 bin      bin          2266 Jun 29 17:40 ./man5/lastlog.5.gz
-r--r--r--    1 bin      bin          3195 Jun 29 17:46 ./man5/inetd.5.gz
